intro-self-001.answer: I am a senior Android engineer focused on large consumer apps, Android architecture, and delivery quality. My strongest project was improving startup stability and modular delivery for a super app where I owned Android-side release readiness and migration coordination, because startup and quality were critical launch risks.
follow_up_answers: I personally owned Android-side module boundary coordination, release readiness checks, and part of the startup quality review with backend and QA.
We tracked startup latency, ANR, and release quality at milestone reviews, and the first milestone reduced startup issues enough for the rollout to continue.

screening-auth-001.answer: I worked on our Android app and owned part of the project structure migration and release stability process during a large modularization effort, because the team needed a safer path than a large rewrite.
follow_up_answers: My responsibility was defining Android-side migration checkpoints, coordinating quality gates with QA, and aligning the Android module boundaries.
We looked at startup, ANR, and release stability around each milestone, and the first migration step was accepted because the key stability metrics stayed within target.

round1-core-001.answer: I use ViewModel and lifecycle-aware collection to avoid duplicated work and unstable state when screens are recreated during complex feature flows.
follow_up_answers: The key failure mode was duplicated actions after recreation, so I separated persistent state from one-off effects.
I validated the change with reproduction steps, logs, and targeted regression verification.

generated-round1-implementation-detail-0.answer: One implementation detail I owned was a safer event pipeline for a payment flow, especially around duplicate actions and recreated screens.
follow_up_answers: The easiest edge case to get wrong was duplicate submission after screen recreation and repeated entry.
We validated it with targeted regression testing and event logs.

round2-perf-001.answer: We optimized startup a bit. I do not remember the exact process or metrics.
follow_up_answers: I am not sure about the exact regression protection.
